Before I reschedule, two quick clarifications so I don't make the wrong change:

1) Is "Dentist Appointment" (id 5) the event you meant to reschedule?  
2) What email address should I use to notify the clinic? The event currently has only your email; I don't have a clinic email on file. If you want, I can (a) try another search for a Downtown Dental contact if you give an alternate name, or (b) proceed and notify only you.

If you confirm (and provide the clinic email if you want them notified), I'll reschedule the event to start 2024-05-20 at 10:00 (keeping the 1-hour duration, so ending 2024-05-20 11:00) and send notification emails to you and the clinic.
